main_limitation: Exposure boundary mass is high (0.512).; Maximum exposure-balance correlation is high (0.915).; Leave-one-subgroup-out spatial robustness is not estimable.; Core estimator status is unstable: baseline_adjusted_ols, difference_outcome_ols.; Residual spatial autocorrelation detected (Moran's I=0.808, p=0.010).
reasons: At least one placebo or competing exposure is not weaker than the main estimate.
